memory.summary: The leisure option is a tempting distraction, but with the project due Thursday and barely started, I need to prioritize the quick chore to maintain momentum.
With no new data and the project deadline looming, I must resist any leisure distraction to maintain my current momentum.
With energy dipping and the project deadline pressing, I must reject any leisure distraction to preserve momentum. Maintaining focus is non-negotiable right now.
My energy is dipping, yet the project deadline remains non-negotiable; I must reject leisure to preserve momentum and secure that future payoff.

desires: Maintain absolute reliability to my team despite my energy being critically low (3.15) and the deadline pressure.
Prevent a total cognitive collapse that would force me to abandon the term project's final push.
Suppress the immediate urge to collapse or skip the remaining 'quick chore' to avoid appearing weak in front of cohort_3.

goals.description: Execute the 'quick_chore' immediately to secure a dopamine hit and clear mental clutter before shifting focus.
goals.rationale: My Achievement drive demands I close low-hanging loops instantly. Even with energy at 3.15, leaving this unfinished creates cognitive drag that threatens my Focus Capacity for the Term Project. This is not just cleaning; it's strategic psychological optimization to ensure I don't appear unreliable.

goals.description: Block out the next 90 minutes strictly for Term Project deep work; reject all social invitations from cohort_3 until Thursday.
goals.rationale: As an Assertive/Deliberate type, I must enforce boundaries now to protect my long-term academic trajectory. Socializing offers short-term comfort but compounds stress by the deadline. I will say no directly if they reach out.

goals.description: Schedule a brief 15-minute review of project progress at 14:45 to ensure I am on track.
goals.rationale: I need a checkpoint, but my current energy state requires uninterrupted flow first. Deferring this prevents context switching and maximizes the efficiency of my upcoming deep work block.

agent.last_reasoning: Completing the chore instantly removes cognitive drag, securing my focus for the Term Project. I'll skip leisure to protect my deadline; if cohort_3 messages, I'll decline directly as planned.
